concerns.text: FR-007 requires 'no causal language' in reports, but this is not explicitly tested for in any task. T039 addresses 'report language compliance' but doesn't specify causal language check.
SC-004 (runtime ≤ 6h) is measured in T044, T045, and T046, but these tasks lack specific acceptance criteria (e.g., 'verify runtime < 6h').
The plan acknowledges a contradiction between the spec and the constitution (Principle VII) but does not include a task to resolve it. This is a plan flaw.
FR-009 requires documentation of temporal aggregation bias, but no task explicitly addresses this documentation. T038 mentions sensitivity reporting, but not bias documentation.

The plan states 'Reference-Validator Agent must verify dataset URLs before Phase 0 begins', but there is no task explicitly assigned to this verification. T008 verifies URLs, but not as a pre-Phase 0 gate.
T012 description is very long and detailed. Consider breaking it down into multiple, more focused tasks.
T023 description is very long and detailed. Consider breaking it down into multiple, more focused tasks.
